title: Context augmentation
description: Fold relevant context into outbound messages before the agent sees them.

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: When off, every message passes through untouched. Turn on once a backend is configured.

fields.label: Backend
options: Groq — ask a Groq model (needs groqApiKey secret)
Worker — run a one-shot worker agent

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Used by the groq and worker backends to pick which model answers. Ignored by the mem backend.
